name: PortCath Insertion
description: Implantable port catheter placement for chemotherapy access

findings.technique: Implantable port catheter was placed under fluoroscopic guidance.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Venous Access
sections.content: Right/left subclavian vein [successfully accessed / no pneumothorax].

sections.name: Catheter Position
sections.content: Catheter tip [positioned in SVC / appropriate location]. No kinking or malposition.

sections.name: Port Pocket
sections.content: Port pocket [created without complication / good hemostasis].

impression:
1. Successful port placement.
2. Proper catheter position confirmed.
